summary: Tested admin toggle features and inbox filter pills. Backend APIs for organization/store/user active toggles all working. Frontend: Organization detail page navigation works, filter pills not stretched. Found bug in stores list API call.

integration_issues.issue: Stores not loading - API endpoint mismatch. Frontend calls /admin/organizations/{orgId}/stores but backend expects /admin/stores?organization_id={orgId}

action_items: Fix stores list API call in /app/frontend/services/api.ts line 381 - change /admin/organizations/${orgId}/stores to /admin/stores?organization_id=${orgId}
Verify store toggle UI works after API fix
critical_code_review_comments: API endpoint mismatch between frontend and backend for stores list - frontend/services/api.ts listStores() calls wrong endpoint
updated_files: /app/backend/routers/admin.py - added active: True default for new organizations and stores
seed_data_creation: Created test stores via API for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Organization detail page navigation works (clicking org card navigates to /admin/organizations/{id}). Backend toggles for org/store/user all working via API. Stores page has API endpoint bug that needs fixing. Inbox filter pills are properly styled and not stretched.

features_tested.organization_detail_navigation: PASS - tapping org card navigates to detail page
features_tested.organization_toggle: PASS - backend API works, UI shows Active badge
features_tested.store_toggle: BLOCKED - stores not loading due to API endpoint mismatch
features_tested.user_toggle: PASS - backend API works, Directory shows Active badges
features_tested.inbox_filter_pills: PASS - pills are compact, not stretched
